title: Junior Backend Developer
description: We are looking for a Junior Backend Developer to join our engineering team. You will build and maintain RESTful APIs using Python and Django, write clean and testable code, and collaborate with frontend developers. Responsibilities include designing database schemas with PostgreSQL, writing unit and integration tests with pytest, and using Git for version control. You will work in an Agile environment with two-week sprints and participate in code reviews. Familiarity with Docker for local development and Linux command-line tools is expected. CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions or Jenkins are used daily. You will be mentored by senior engineers and expected to grow quickly.

title: Junior Data Engineer
description: We are hiring a Junior Data Engineer to help build and maintain our data infrastructure. You will design and implement ETL pipelines using Python and Apache Airflow, work with large datasets stored in PostgreSQL and AWS S3, and support data modelling efforts using star schema and dimensional modelling principles. You will write SQL queries for data extraction and transformation, document data flows, and ensure data quality through automated testing. Experience with pandas and basic cloud services (AWS or GCP) is desirable. You will collaborate closely with data analysts and senior engineers in a fast-paced fintech environment.

title: Graduate Software Engineer
description: We are seeking a Graduate Software Engineer to join our product team. You will contribute to the full software development lifecycle from requirements to deployment. Core technologies include Python, JavaScript, and REST APIs. You will work with Git, participate in Agile ceremonies, write automated tests, and contribute to code reviews. Strong problem-solving skills and a desire to learn are essential. You will be exposed to cloud infrastructure on AWS, containerisation with Docker, and microservices architecture. This is an excellent opportunity for a recent graduate looking to grow in a supportive engineering culture.

title: Security Analyst Intern
description: We are looking for a Security Analyst Intern to support our cyber security operations team. Responsibilities include monitoring security alerts, analysing logs using SIEM tools, conducting vulnerability assessments, and assisting with incident response procedures. You will learn to apply OWASP principles, implement ICT security policies, and create incident reports. Familiarity with Linux, networking fundamentals, and security frameworks such as ISO 27001 or NIST is advantageous. You will shadow senior analysts and contribute to security awareness training.

title: Frontend Developer
description: We are hiring a Junior Frontend Developer to build responsive accessible web interfaces. You will work primarily with React TypeScript and CSS translating design mockups into functional components. Responsibilities include writing clean component-based code implementing REST API integrations writing unit tests with Jest and collaborating with UX designers. Experience with Git basic CI/CD and browser developer tools is expected. Familiarity with accessibility standards and performance optimisation techniques is a plus. You will work in a cross-functional team using Agile methodology.

title: Data Analyst
description: We are looking for a Graduate Data Analyst to join our business intelligence team. You will analyse large datasets to generate insights that inform strategic decisions. Responsibilities include writing complex SQL queries building dashboards in Tableau or Power BI performing statistical analysis using Python or R and presenting findings to stakeholders. You will clean and validate data identify trends and anomalies and collaborate with data engineers to improve data pipelines. Strong communication skills and the ability to translate data into business language are essential.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: We are seeking a Junior Machine Learning Engineer to join our AI team. You will develop and deploy machine learning models using Python scikit-learn and TensorFlow or PyTorch. Responsibilities include data preprocessing feature engineering model training and evaluation and writing production-ready inference code. You will use MLflow for experiment tracking Docker for containerisation and AWS SageMaker for deployment. Familiarity with NLP techniques transformers and vector embeddings is advantageous. A strong mathematical background in linear algebra and statistics is essential.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: We are hiring a Junior DevOps Engineer to support our infrastructure and deployment pipelines. You will manage CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions containerise applications with Docker and Kubernetes and monitor services using Prometheus and Grafana. Responsibilities include infrastructure as code using Terraform managing AWS cloud resources and supporting deployment automation. You will work closely with software engineers to improve build and release processes. Linux administration shell scripting and networking fundamentals are essential.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for a Full Stack Developer to work across our web platform. You will build backend services with Python and Django or Flask and frontend interfaces with React and JavaScript. Responsibilities include designing RESTful APIs integrating third-party services writing automated tests and managing deployments with Docker and AWS. You will work with PostgreSQL databases implement authentication and authorisation and participate in code reviews. Agile methodology Git and strong communication skills are expected.

title: QA Engineer
description: We are seeking a Graduate QA Engineer to ensure the quality of our software products. You will design and execute manual and automated test plans write test cases in pytest and Selenium and report bugs clearly with reproducible steps. Responsibilities include regression testing API testing using Postman and performance testing. You will collaborate with developers and product managers to understand requirements and define acceptance criteria. Experience with CI/CD pipelines Git and Agile workflows is expected.

title: Cloud Engineer
description: We are hiring a Graduate Cloud Engineer to help manage and scale our cloud infrastructure on AWS. Responsibilities include provisioning cloud resources using Terraform managing containerised workloads with Kubernetes and Docker setting up monitoring and alerting and supporting disaster recovery planning. You will work with S3 EC2 RDS Lambda and CloudWatch. Scripting with Python or Bash is required for automation tasks. Understanding of networking concepts and IAM policies is essential.

title: Data Scientist
description: We are looking for a Junior Data Scientist to join our analytics team. You will build predictive models conduct statistical analysis and develop data-driven solutions to business problems. Responsibilities include exploratory data analysis using Python and pandas feature engineering model selection and evaluation and communicating findings to non-technical stakeholders. Experience with scikit-learn NLP and time series analysis is desirable. You will use Jupyter notebooks Git and SQL in your daily workflow.

title: iOS Developer
description: We are seeking a Junior iOS Developer to help build and maintain our mobile application. You will write Swift code implement UI components using SwiftUI and UIKit and integrate REST APIs. Responsibilities include writing unit tests debugging performance issues submitting builds to the App Store and participating in code reviews. Familiarity with Xcode Git and Agile development practices is expected. You will collaborate with Android developers backend engineers and designers.

title: Android Developer
description: We are hiring a Graduate Android Developer to build features for our mobile platform. You will develop using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose integrate RESTful APIs and write unit and UI tests. Responsibilities include implementing MVVM architecture managing app state and optimising for performance and battery life. Experience with Android Studio Git and publishing to the Google Play Store is expected. Familiarity with Coroutines Room database and Retrofit is advantageous.

title: Database Administrator
description: We are looking for a Graduate Database Administrator to manage and optimise our relational database systems. You will work with PostgreSQL and MySQL write complex SQL queries design and maintain database schemas and implement backup and recovery strategies. Responsibilities include performance tuning query optimisation index management and monitoring database health. Understanding of transactions stored procedures triggers and views is required.

title: Embedded Systems Engineer
description: We are seeking a Graduate Embedded Systems Engineer to develop firmware for IoT devices. You will write C and C++ code for microcontrollers implement communication protocols and debug hardware-software interactions. Responsibilities include RTOS development power management and over-the-air firmware updates. Experience with ARM Cortex-M processors Git and unit testing embedded code is expected. Familiarity with Python for scripting and test automation is a plus.

title: Cyber Security Analyst
description: We are hiring a Graduate Cyber Security Analyst to join our security operations centre. You will monitor security events investigate alerts perform threat hunting and respond to incidents. Responsibilities include vulnerability scanning penetration testing support writing security reports and maintaining security documentation. Experience with SIEM tools Linux networking protocols and security frameworks is expected. Familiarity with Python scripting for security automation is advantageous.

title: Network Engineer
description: We are looking for a Graduate Network Engineer to support and maintain our corporate network infrastructure. Responsibilities include configuring routers and switches managing VLANs VPNs and firewall rules and troubleshooting connectivity issues. You will monitor network performance assist with network capacity planning and document topology changes. Understanding of TCP/IP DNS DHCP BGP and OSPF is essential.

title: Blockchain Developer
description: We are seeking a Graduate Blockchain Developer to build decentralised applications. You will write smart contracts in Solidity deploy to Ethereum or compatible networks and develop backend services that interact with blockchain nodes using Web3.js or ethers.js. Responsibilities include designing token standards writing unit tests and auditing contracts for security vulnerabilities. Understanding of consensus mechanisms and cryptographic primitives is advantageous.

title: Game Developer
description: We are hiring a Graduate Game Developer to join our mobile games studio. You will develop games using Unity and C# implement gameplay mechanics design UI systems and optimise performance for iOS and Android. Responsibilities include integrating analytics SDKs implementing in-app purchases and working with artists and designers. Experience with Git Agile development and publishing to app stores is expected.

title: Robotics Engineer
description: We are looking for a Graduate Robotics Engineer to develop autonomous systems. You will work with ROS implement sensor fusion algorithms develop motion planning and control systems and test robots in simulation environments. Responsibilities include writing Python and C++ code for real-time control integrating cameras and LiDAR sensors and collaborating with mechanical engineers. Understanding of SLAM PID controllers and computer vision is advantageous.

title: Bioinformatics Engineer
description: We are seeking a Graduate Bioinformatics Engineer to support genomic data analysis pipelines. You will write Python and R scripts for processing sequencing data implement workflows using Nextflow or Snakemake and manage large datasets on cloud platforms. Responsibilities include quality control of sequencing runs variant calling and visualising results. Experience with Linux command line SQL databases and Git is essential.

title: AI Research Engineer
description: We are hiring a Graduate AI Research Engineer to support our applied research team. You will implement and evaluate state-of-the-art machine learning models run experiments using PyTorch and Hugging Face Transformers and analyse results using statistical methods. Responsibilities include dataset curation literature review writing technical reports and contributing to open-source projects. Experience with NLP computer vision or reinforcement learning is desirable.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: We are looking for a Graduate Site Reliability Engineer to ensure the reliability and performance of our production systems. You will define and monitor SLOs and SLIs build alerting and dashboards using Prometheus and Grafana manage incident response and conduct post-mortems. Responsibilities include automating toil with Python or Go managing Kubernetes clusters and improving deployment pipelines. Understanding of distributed systems load balancing and caching strategies is essential.

title: Product Data Analyst
description: We are seeking a Graduate Product Data Analyst to provide data-driven insights for our product team. You will analyse user behaviour using SQL and Python build dashboards in Looker or Metabase and design and interpret A/B experiments. Responsibilities include defining metrics creating cohort analyses and presenting recommendations to product managers and engineers. Experience with event tracking tools and statistical concepts is desirable.

title: Platform Engineer
description: We are hiring a Graduate Platform Engineer to build and maintain internal developer platforms. You will develop tooling and automation to improve developer productivity manage Kubernetes infrastructure implement GitOps workflows using ArgoCD or Flux and maintain CI/CD pipelines. Responsibilities include writing infrastructure as code with Terraform managing secrets with Vault and supporting service mesh implementations. Experience with Docker Linux Python scripting and observability tools is expected.

title: NLP Engineer
description: We are looking for a Graduate NLP Engineer to build natural language processing systems. You will fine-tune transformer models using Hugging Face implement text classification named entity recognition and information extraction pipelines. Responsibilities include data annotation model evaluation and deploying inference services using FastAPI and Docker. Experience with Python PyTorch and SQL is essential. Familiarity with vector databases semantic search and RAG architectures is advantageous.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: We are seeking a Graduate Computer Vision Engineer to develop visual AI systems. You will implement object detection segmentation and classification models using PyTorch and OpenCV. Responsibilities include curating and annotating datasets training and evaluating models optimising for inference speed and deploying to edge devices or cloud endpoints. Experience with YOLO ResNet and transformer-based vision models is desirable.

title: Quantitative Developer
description: We are hiring a Graduate Quantitative Developer to support our algorithmic trading team. You will implement quantitative models in Python backtest trading strategies using historical data and optimise execution algorithms. Responsibilities include data ingestion from market feeds statistical analysis and building risk management tools. Strong mathematical skills in probability statistics and linear algebra are essential. Experience with pandas NumPy and SQL is required.

title: Healthcare Data Analyst
description: We are looking for a Graduate Healthcare Data Analyst to support clinical research and operational reporting. You will analyse patient datasets using SQL and Python build reports for clinical teams and ensure data governance standards are met. Responsibilities include data cleaning statistical analysis and visualisation using Tableau or Power BI. Understanding of NHS data standards GDPR and healthcare terminologies is advantageous.

title: Graduate Software Developer
description: We are seeking a Graduate Software Developer to join our growing engineering team in Manchester. You will write clean maintainable code in Python and JavaScript contribute to API development and participate in agile ceremonies. Responsibilities include writing unit tests reviewing code debugging production issues and contributing to technical documentation. You will work with PostgreSQL Git and Docker.

title: Junior Systems Analyst
description: We are hiring a Junior Systems Analyst to bridge business requirements and technical implementation. You will gather and document requirements produce functional specifications map data flows and support user acceptance testing. Responsibilities include analysing existing systems identifying inefficiencies and proposing improvements. Familiarity with SQL for data querying UML for process modelling and Agile methodology is expected.

title: Graduate Application Support Engineer
description: We are looking for a Graduate Application Support Engineer to provide technical support for our enterprise software platform. You will investigate and resolve incidents escalate complex issues to development teams write SQL queries to diagnose data problems and maintain runbooks and knowledge base articles. Responsibilities include monitoring application health coordinating with third-party vendors and onboarding new users.

title: Junior Infrastructure Engineer
description: We are seeking a Junior Infrastructure Engineer to manage on-premises and cloud infrastructure. You will configure and maintain servers running Linux and Windows manage virtualisation platforms and support network infrastructure. Responsibilities include patching backup management capacity planning and supporting disaster recovery drills. Experience with PowerShell or Bash scripting Active Directory and cloud platforms is advantageous.

title: Data Governance Analyst
description: We are hiring a Graduate Data Governance Analyst to support our data management programme. You will maintain data dictionaries document data lineage enforce data quality standards and support GDPR compliance activities. Responsibilities include working with data stewards across business units running data quality reports using SQL and Python and maintaining metadata in data catalogue tools.

title: Junior Software Tester
description: We are looking for a Junior Software Tester to support quality assurance across our product suite. You will design and execute test cases for web and mobile applications perform exploratory and regression testing and log defects with clear reproduction steps. Responsibilities include API testing using Postman basic automation with Selenium or Cypress and contributing to test plans. Familiarity with Agile methodology Git and bug tracking tools is expected.

title: Graduate IT Consultant
description: We are seeking a Graduate IT Consultant to join our technology advisory practice. You will support client engagements in digital transformation system implementation and process improvement. Responsibilities include requirements gathering stakeholder workshops process mapping and preparing presentations and reports. Familiarity with project management methodologies SQL for data analysis and enterprise software is advantageous.

title: Penetration Tester
description: We are hiring a Graduate Penetration Tester to join our offensive security team. You will conduct web application network and infrastructure penetration tests document vulnerabilities and provide remediation guidance. Responsibilities include reconnaissance exploitation using tools like Burp Suite Metasploit and Nmap and writing clear technical reports. Understanding of OWASP Top 10 CVE databases and common attack vectors is essential.

title: Graduate UX Researcher
description: We are looking for a Graduate UX Researcher to support our product design team. You will plan and conduct user research including interviews usability tests and surveys. Responsibilities include synthesising findings into actionable insights creating affinity maps and journey maps and presenting recommendations to designers and product managers. Familiarity with research tools basic statistics and accessibility standards is desirable.

title: Graduate Scrum Master
description: We are seeking a Graduate Scrum Master to facilitate agile ceremonies and support development teams. You will run daily stand-ups sprint planning retrospectives and backlog refinement sessions. Responsibilities include removing blockers tracking team velocity maintaining sprint boards in Jira and coaching team members on agile principles. Familiarity with Scrum Kanban and agile metrics is expected.

title: ETL Developer
description: We are hiring a Graduate ETL Developer to build data integration pipelines. You will design and implement ETL processes using Python Apache Spark and Airflow extract data from APIs and databases transform it according to business rules and load it into data warehouses. Responsibilities include writing SQL for data transformation monitoring pipeline health and troubleshooting data quality issues. Understanding of dimensional modelling and SCD types is advantageous.

title: Junior Product Manager
description: We are looking for a Junior Product Manager to support our product team in defining and delivering features. You will write user stories maintain the product backlog conduct competitor analysis and gather feedback from users and stakeholders. Responsibilities include defining acceptance criteria coordinating with engineering and design teams and tracking key product metrics. Familiarity with Agile methodology Jira and basic SQL for data analysis is advantageous.

title: Graduate Business Intelligence Developer
description: We are seeking a Graduate BI Developer to build reporting and analytics solutions. You will develop dashboards and reports in Power BI or Tableau write complex SQL queries model data in data warehouses and optimise report performance. Responsibilities include working with business stakeholders to understand requirements maintaining BI documentation and ensuring data accuracy.

title: Software Engineer in Test
description: We are hiring a Software Engineer in Test to build automation frameworks and improve test coverage. You will write automated tests in Python or Java using pytest or JUnit build CI/CD-integrated test pipelines and develop performance tests. Responsibilities include API testing contract testing and maintaining test environments with Docker. You will collaborate with developers and QA engineers to shift testing left and embed quality throughout the development lifecycle.

title: Graduate Data Architect
description: We are looking for a Graduate Data Architect to support our enterprise data strategy. You will model logical and physical data models document data flows and integrations and advise on database design decisions. Responsibilities include working with data engineers and analysts to implement data governance standards selecting appropriate data storage technologies and supporting migration projects.

title: Junior API Developer
description: We are seeking a Junior API Developer to design and build RESTful and GraphQL APIs. You will use Python with FastAPI or Django REST Framework write OpenAPI documentation implement authentication using OAuth2 and JWT and write comprehensive unit and integration tests. Responsibilities include API versioning rate limiting and monitoring API performance. Familiarity with Postman Git and PostgreSQL is expected.

title: Graduate GIS Analyst
description: We are hiring a Graduate GIS Analyst to support spatial data analysis projects. You will work with geographic information systems write Python scripts using GeoPandas and Shapely and manage spatial databases using PostGIS. Responsibilities include data collection cleaning and visualisation of geographic datasets producing maps and reports and supporting urban planning and environmental projects.

title: Graduate Automation Engineer
description: We are looking for a Graduate Automation Engineer to develop robotic process automation solutions. You will design and build bots using UiPath or Blue Prism automate repetitive business processes and integrate with enterprise systems. Responsibilities include process mapping bot deployment exception handling and maintaining automation documentation. Familiarity with Python scripting SQL and REST API integration is advantageous.

title: Junior Data Warehouse Engineer
description: We are seeking a Junior Data Warehouse Engineer to build and maintain our enterprise data warehouse. You will design dimensional models implement ELT pipelines using dbt and Snowflake write SQL for data transformation and maintain data quality checks. Responsibilities include working with analysts to understand reporting requirements optimising query performance and managing warehouse costs.

title: Graduate Technical Writer
description: We are hiring a Graduate Technical Writer to create and maintain technical documentation for our software products. You will write API documentation user guides internal runbooks and release notes. Responsibilities include working with engineers to understand complex systems structuring content clearly for different audiences and maintaining a documentation site. Familiarity with Markdown Git REST APIs and diagramming tools is expected.

title: Graduate Marketing Manager
description: We are looking for a Graduate Marketing Manager to support our brand and campaigns team. You will plan and execute digital marketing campaigns across social media email and paid channels. Responsibilities include writing copy managing content calendars analysing campaign performance using Google Analytics and coordinating with design and sales teams. Familiarity with SEO SEM HubSpot or Mailchimp and A/B testing is advantageous. Strong written communication creativity and analytical skills are essential.

title: Graduate HR Advisor
description: We are seeking a Graduate HR Advisor to support our people team across recruitment employee relations and HR operations. You will manage job postings screen candidates coordinate interviews and onboard new starters. Responsibilities include maintaining HR records supporting performance review processes and advising managers on employment policy. Familiarity with HRIS systems employment law basics and Excel for reporting is advantageous.

title: Graduate Financial Analyst
description: We are hiring a Graduate Financial Analyst to support our finance team with budgeting forecasting and reporting. You will prepare financial models in Excel analyse variances and produce management accounts. Responsibilities include monthly close activities supporting audits and building financial dashboards. Familiarity with accounting principles ERP systems and SQL for data extraction is advantageous.

title: Graduate Account Manager
description: We are looking for a Graduate Account Manager to manage and grow a portfolio of client relationships. You will onboard new clients conduct regular check-ins identify upsell opportunities and resolve issues promptly. Responsibilities include preparing client reports coordinating with internal teams and maintaining accurate records in Salesforce. Strong communication negotiation and problem-solving skills are essential.

title: Graduate Paralegal
description: We are seeking a Graduate Paralegal to support our legal team in corporate and commercial matters. You will draft and review contracts conduct legal research manage document disclosure and assist with due diligence for transactions. Responsibilities include maintaining case files liaising with clients and external counsel and supporting litigation preparation. Strong attention to detail analytical thinking and written communication skills are essential.

title: Graduate Supply Chain Analyst
description: We are hiring a Graduate Supply Chain Analyst to optimise our logistics and procurement operations. You will analyse supply chain data identify bottlenecks support supplier negotiations and monitor inventory levels. Responsibilities include building reports using Excel and Power BI coordinating with warehousing and distribution teams and maintaining supplier records in ERP systems. Strong analytical communication and project management skills are essential.

title: Graduate Journalist
description: We are looking for a Graduate Journalist to produce content for our digital news platform. You will research and write news articles conduct interviews fact-check sources and file stories to deadline. Responsibilities include social media publishing SEO optimisation of articles and contributing to editorial meetings. Strong writing storytelling and interview skills are essential.

title: Graduate Social Worker
description: We are seeking a Newly Qualified Social Worker to join our children and families team. You will manage a caseload of vulnerable children and families conduct assessments develop care plans and work with multi-agency partners. Responsibilities include court report writing chairing review meetings and maintaining case records. Strong communication resilience and professional boundaries are essential.

title: Graduate Architect
description: We are hiring a Graduate Architect to join our award-winning architecture practice. You will contribute to design projects across residential and commercial sectors produce drawings using AutoCAD and Revit attend site visits and liaise with clients and consultants. Responsibilities include developing design concepts producing planning submissions and maintaining project documentation.

title: Graduate Urban Planner
description: We are looking for a Graduate Urban Planner to support our planning consultancy team. You will prepare planning applications write supporting statements conduct site appraisals and attend planning committee meetings. Responsibilities include policy research community engagement and liaising with local planning authorities. Familiarity with the UK planning system GIS tools and report writing is expected.

title: Graduate Accountant
description: We are seeking a Graduate Accountant to join our audit and assurance team. You will assist with statutory audits prepare working papers conduct financial analysis and liaise with clients to gather audit evidence. Responsibilities include testing controls reconciling accounts and contributing to audit reports. Familiarity with accounting standards Excel and audit software is advantageous.

title: Graduate PR Executive
description: We are hiring a Graduate PR Executive to support our communications team. You will write press releases pitch stories to journalists manage media lists and monitor press coverage. Responsibilities include supporting crisis communications organising press events and maintaining relationships with key media contacts. Strong written and verbal communication skills creativity and the ability to work to tight deadlines are essential.

title: Graduate Recruitment Consultant
description: We are looking for a Graduate Recruitment Consultant to join our specialist staffing agency. You will source candidates through job boards LinkedIn and referrals conduct telephone and face-to-face interviews and match candidates to client vacancies. Responsibilities include business development account management and meeting revenue targets. Strong communication resilience and commercial acumen are essential.

title: Graduate Policy Analyst
description: We are seeking a Graduate Policy Analyst to support our public policy team. You will research policy issues prepare briefings and reports engage with stakeholders and support consultation responses. Responsibilities include horizon scanning data analysis and contributing to policy recommendations. Strong analytical thinking communication and the ability to synthesise complex information are essential.

title: Graduate Civil Engineer
description: We are hiring a Graduate Civil Engineer to join our infrastructure consultancy. You will contribute to highway drainage and structural design projects produce technical drawings using AutoCAD and Civil 3D and support site investigations. Responsibilities include hydraulic modelling preparing technical reports coordinating with contractors and supporting planning applications.

title: Graduate Environmental Consultant
description: We are looking for a Graduate Environmental Consultant to support our sustainability and EIA team. You will conduct environmental surveys prepare environmental impact assessments write technical reports and liaise with regulators and planning authorities. Responsibilities include habitat surveys noise and air quality assessments and supporting ES chapters. Strong report writing attention to detail and project management skills are essential.

title: Graduate Teacher
description: We are seeking a Graduate Teacher to join our outstanding secondary school. You will plan and deliver engaging lessons assess pupil progress manage classroom behaviour and contribute to curriculum development. Responsibilities include marking report writing attending parents evenings and supporting extracurricular activities. Strong subject knowledge enthusiasm for education and the ability to build positive relationships with young people are essential.

title: Graduate Nurse
description: We are hiring a Newly Qualified Nurse to join our acute medical ward. You will deliver evidence-based patient care administer medications monitor vital signs and collaborate with the multidisciplinary team. Responsibilities include documentation patient advocacy discharge planning and mentoring student nurses. Strong clinical skills compassion and the ability to work under pressure are essential.

title: Graduate Quantity Surveyor
description: We are looking for a Graduate Quantity Surveyor to join our commercial construction team. You will prepare cost plans tender documents and contract bills of quantities. Responsibilities include procurement subcontractor management valuation of works and final account preparation. Familiarity with NEC or JCT contracts cost management software and Excel is expected. Strong numerical skills commercial awareness and attention to detail are essential.

title: Graduate Counsellor
description: We are seeking a Graduate Counsellor to join our employee assistance programme team. You will provide short-term therapeutic support to clients experiencing anxiety depression and workplace stress. Responsibilities include conducting assessments delivering CBT and person-centred interventions maintaining case notes and liaising with GPs and psychiatrists where appropriate. Strong empathy professional boundaries and the ability to manage a varied caseload are essential.
